title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Gaborone City Council (hairdresser and Barber) Bye-laws
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Gaborone City Council (hairdresser and Barber) Bye-laws

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Bye-Laws may be cited as the Gaborone City Council (Hairdresser and Barber) Bye-Laws.
